# Individual file exclusions for giantt_source_manager
# One file path per line, relative to the directory being scanned
# Lines starting with # are comments and will be ignored

# Common output files
giantt_complete.txt
*.log
*.tmp

# Generated files
GeneratedPluginRegistrant.java
local.properties
.flutter-plugins
.flutter-plugins-dependencies
.packages
pubspec.lock

# Build artifacts
gradlew
gradlew.bat
gradle-wrapper.jar
*.iml

# Data / backup files
*.backup
*.jsonl
items.txt
metadata.json

# Binary and Android resource files
*.png
*.xml
